T0.2.title: VesselFM on L4 — SSH network error (spot preemption?)
T0.2.failure: ssh: Network is unreachable after Docker container started

T0.3.title: sam3_hybrid on L4 (BF16) — val_loss still NaN!
T0.3.finding: BF16 confirmed active but val_loss=NaN persists → AMP is root cause, not dtype

findings.bf16_doesnt_fix_nan: val_loss=NaN persists on L4 (BF16) with AMP=True. Root cause: AMP autocast + 3D sliding_window_inference, not encoder dtype.
findings.vesselfm_ssh_error: L4 asia-northeast3-a: SSH failed after container started. Spot preemption or network issue.
